name_en: Chane1🖤23khobo underarm hippie bag is so cool! 🔥AS4443 🦋Simply too beautiful haha. I think the handbag look is great, very cool with casual wear!✅Has chain and adjustable buckle, petite girls can also wear it short as a crossbody.🍬The bottom details are beautifully made, and the capacity is also OK👍. The real thing is beautiful, texture is great. Size: 23×23X6cm
